items.title: Jim Cramer on Home Depot: “You Can Own it and Let That Dividend Compound Over Time”
items.description: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer shared insights on. Cramer explained why the Charitable Trust kept adding to Home Depot shares, as he remarked: “One year ago today, we bought the stock of Home Depot for the Charitable Trust. We were looking for a rate cut… We got that […]

items.title: Take the Zacks Approach to Beat the Markets: Hecla Mining, GE Aerospace & Stride in Focus
items.description: Zacks highlights Hecla Mining, GE Aerospace, and Stride as standout performers in a volatile market, driven by earnings trends and stock upgrades.

items.title: Citigroup, Home Depot, Rocket Companies And A Tech Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
items.description: Investors may need to rethink strategies as the S&P 100 reshuffle signals shift in market dynamics with Uber, Home Depot, Citigroup making unexpected moves.

items.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, AppLovin And Robinhood Set To Jump; Apple iPhone Event Due
items.description: Dow Jones futures: The stock market had a mixed week but is right at highs. The Apple iPhone event looms. Nvidia, Tesla, AppLovin are in focus.
